subject: GeneralKnowledge
title: GeneralKnowledge Test - 19
description: A mix of fun and educational questions covering animals, geography, science, community, and health for Grade 4 students.

questions.q: Which of these animals is known for having a mane of hair around its neck?
questions.explanation: Male lions are famous for the thick mane of hair that grows around their necks.
questions.hint: It is often called the 'King of the Jungle'.
questions.objective: Identify common animals and their physical traits.

questions.q: What is the capital of Spain?
questions.explanation: Madrid is the capital city of Spain and its largest city.
questions.hint: It is located in the heart of the country.

questions.q: Which of these is a gas that we breathe out?
questions.explanation: When we exhale, we release carbon dioxide, which is a waste product of our body's processes.
questions.hint: Plants need this gas to make food.

questions.q: What is the name of the galaxy that contains our Solar System?
questions.explanation: Our Solar System resides within the Milky Way galaxy.
questions.hint: It has a name that sounds like a candy bar.

questions.q: Which of these is a healthy habit for your body?
options: Brushing your teeth twice a day
questions.answer: Brushing your teeth twice a day
questions.explanation: Brushing your teeth daily helps remove plaque and keeps your mouth healthy.
questions.hint: It involves a toothbrush and toothpaste.

questions.q: Who is a community helper that helps sick animals?
questions.explanation: Veterinarians are trained to provide medical care for animals.

questions.q: What is the freezing point of water in Celsius?
questions.explanation: Water turns to ice at 0 degrees Celsius.
questions.hint: It is the starting number on the Celsius scale.

questions.q: Which continent is the largest by land area?
questions.explanation: Asia is the largest continent in the world, covering about 30% of the Earth's land.
questions.hint: It is very populous and large.

questions.q: What force keeps our feet on the ground?
questions.explanation: Gravity is the force that attracts objects toward the center of the Earth.

questions.q: Which of these is a community helper who puts out fires?
questions.explanation: Firefighters are responsible for extinguishing fires and helping in emergencies.
questions.hint: They use water hoses and wear special gear.
